testcase.name: test_api[PUT /api/v1/compute/job/{resource_id}/{job_id}]

failure.message:
requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='iri-dev.ppg.es.net', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=30)
Reproduce with:
curl -X PUT -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"arguments": ["-n", "100"], "attributes": null, "container": {"image": "docker.io/library/ubuntu:latest", "volume_mounts": [{"read_only": true, "source": "/data/project", "target": [null, null]}]}, "directory": "/home/user/work", "environment": {"OMP_NUM_THREADS": "4"}, "executable": "/usr/bin/python", "inherit_environment": true, "launcher": "srun", "name": "my-job", "post_launch": "echo done", "pre_launch": "module load cuda", "resources": null, "stderr_path": "/home/user/error.txt", "stdin_path": "/home/user/input.txt", "stdout_path": "/home/user/output.txt"}' https://iri-dev.ppg.es.net/api/v1/compute/job/0/0

testcase.failure:
E TimeoutError: The read operation timed out
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: E urllib3.exceptions.ReadTimeoutError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='iri-dev.ppg.es.net', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=30)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: E requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='iri-dev.ppg.es.net', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=30)
Reproduce with:
curl -X PUT -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"arguments": ["-n", "100"], "attributes": null, "container": {"image": "docker.io/library/ubuntu:latest", "volume_mounts": [{"read_only": true, "source": "/data/project", "target": [null, null]}]}, "directory": "/home/user/work", "environment": {"OMP_NUM_THREADS": "4"}, "executable": "/usr/bin/python", "inherit_environment": true, "launcher": "srun", "name": "my-job", "post_launch": "echo done", "pre_launch": "module load cuda", "resources": null, "stderr_path": "/home/user/error.txt", "stdin_path": "/home/user/input.txt", "stdout_path": "/home/user/output.txt"}' https://iri-dev.ppg.es.net/api/v1/compute/job/0/0

testcase.name: test_api[GET /api/v1/filesystem/ls/{resource_id}]

failure.message:
requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='iri-dev.ppg.es.net', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=30)
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'https://iri-dev.ppg.es.net/api/v1/filesystem/ls/0?path=&showHidden=true&numericUid=true&recursive=0&dereference=true'

testcase.failure:
E TimeoutError: The read operation timed out
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: E urllib3.exceptions.ReadTimeoutError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='iri-dev.ppg.es.net', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=30)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: E requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='iri-dev.ppg.es.net', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=30)
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'https://iri-dev.ppg.es.net/api/v1/filesystem/ls/0?path=&showHidden=true&numericUid=true&recursive=0&dereference=true'
